title: Sabbatical leave not to preclude salary increase
doc_html:
§1180.  Sabbatical leave not to preclude salary increase

No person on sabbatical leave shall be denied the regular increment of increase in salary because of absence on sabbatical leave.
doc_text:
§1180.  Sabbatical leave not to preclude salary increase
No person on sabbatical leave shall be denied the regular increment of increase in salary because of absence on sabbatical leave.
